content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-6-max

## Summary

Reviewed all changes: br_health.rs (MalformedJsonl variant + JSONL validation), br_process.rs (sync_import, sync_if_dirty, ensure_synced, check_available_with_timeout), service.rs and success_reconciliation.rs (pre-operation health gates), cli/project.rs (claim_bead health gate). The implementation is clean and correct. Health checks are properly integrated at all mutation entry points. Sync lifecycle invariants are well-documented. The MalformedJsonl detection correctly validates every JSONL line before any mutation. Conflict marker detection correctly avoids false positives on JSON lines containing marker substrings (test at br_health.rs:192-205 confirms). check_available_with_timeout adds a timeout to the previously unbounded version probe — a safety improvement. All new code paths have corresponding tests. One minor observation: the BrNotFound arm in wait_with_output error mapping (br_process.rs:429-431) is unreachable after a successful spawn(), but this is cosmetic dead code, not a correctness issue. No bugs, safety problems, or significant maintainability risks found.

## Amendments

None.
